summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GuessIt Football Platform achievement system upgrade. All backend APIs and frontend UI features working correctly. Achievement system displays 6 closest-to-completion achievements, modal functionality, progress bars, and all integration points functioning as designed.
passed_tests: GET /api/achievements endpoint returns proper structure with display (6 items), all (25 items), completed_count (0), total_count (25), and user stats
GET /api/profile/bundle includes achievements field with display, all, completed_count, total_count data
Profile page renders achievements section with '0/25 unlocked' counter and 'View All' button
Each achievement badge shows progress bars with current/threshold values (0/1, 0/10, 0/5, etc.)
Achievements display shows locked icons for 0% achievements with proper styling
'View All' button opens modal with backdrop blur overlay successfully
Modal displays All/In Progress/Completed tabs with proper counts (25/25/0)
Modal sorting options (Progress, Category, Difficulty) all functional and responsive
Modal is scrollable and displays all 25 achievements correctly
Modal close button (X) works properly and closes modal
Profile page shows all sections: header, stats, recent activity, favorites, friends, performance, leaderboard
Homepage renders correctly with no regressions or broken functionality
Backend health check endpoint returns healthy status
All 13 backend API tests passed with 100% success rate
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (13/13 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all UI components and interactions working)
